title: Majestic Leo Lion with Stars Coloring Page
seoTitle: Majestic Leo Lion and Celestial Stars Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a majestic celestial Leo lion head surrounded by night stars. Free high-quality PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Lions are the only social wild cats, living in family groups called prides that can consist of up to 40 lions.
A lion's roar can be heard from up to 5 miles (8 kilometers) away, acting as a warning to intruders.
Coloring safari animals teaches kids about ecological conservation and African savannah wildlife.
